steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Identify the given side length
steps.content: Triangle A has each side equal to 270 millimeters.

steps.title: Apply the doubling relationship
steps.content:
Triangle B's sides are double the length of triangle A's sides. Multiply:
$$2 \times 270 = 540 \text{ millimeters}$$
The question asks for one side length of triangle B, not perimeter or area. That confirms C is correct.
